'''chogadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:raccoonlike|raccoonlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raccoonlike|raccoonlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chogadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogadithi|chogadithi]] || [[word:chogadiji|chogadiji]] || [[word:chogadishi|chogadishi]] || [[word:chogadiki|chogadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogaduthuthu|chogaduthuthu]] || [[word:chogadujuju|chogadujuju]] || [[word:chogadushushu|chogadushushu]] || [[word:chogadukuku|chogadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogaduthu|chogaduthu]] || [[word:chogaduju|chogaduju]] || [[word:chogadushu|chogadushu]] || [[word:chogaduku|chogaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogadufthuf|chogadufthuf]] || [[word:chogadufjuf|chogadufjuf]] || [[word:chogadufshuf|chogadufshuf]] || [[word:chogadufkuf|chogadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogadethe|chogadethe]] || [[word:chogadeje|chogadeje]] || [[word:chogadeshe|chogadeshe]] || [[word:chogadeke|chogadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogadothotho|chogadothotho]] || [[word:chogadojojo|chogadojojo]] || [[word:chogadoshosho|chogadoshosho]] || [[word:chogadokoko|chogadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogadotho|chogadotho]] || [[word:chogadojo|chogadojo]] || [[word:chogadosho|chogadosho]] || [[word:chogadoko|chogadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogadofthof|chogadofthof]] || [[word:chogadofjof|chogadofjof]] || [[word:chogadofshof|chogadofshof]] || [[word:chogadofkof|chogadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogadïfthïf|chogadïfthïf]] || [[word:chogadïfjïf|chogadïfjïf]] || [[word:chogadïfshïf|chogadïfshïf]] || [[word:chogadïfkïf|chogadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogadïfthïfthïf|chogadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chogadïfjïfjïf|chogadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chogadïfshïfshïf|chogadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chogadïfkïfkïf|chogadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogadïfthïf|chogadïfthïf]] || [[word:chogadïfjïf|chogadïfjïf]] || [[word:chogadïfshïf|chogadïfshïf]] || [[word:chogadïfkïf|chogadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogadïfthïf|chogadïfthïf]] || [[word:chogadïfjïf|chogadïfjïf]] || [[word:chogadïfshïf|chogadïfshïf]] || [[word:chogadïfkïf|chogadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chogadæthæ|chogadæthæ]] || [[word:chogadæjæ|chogadæjæ]] || [[word:chogadæshæ|chogadæshæ]] || [[word:chogadækæ|chogadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chogadathatha|chogadathatha]] || [[word:chogadajaja|chogadajaja]] || [[word:chogadashasha|chogadashasha]] || [[word:chogadakaka|chogadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chogadatha|chogadatha]] || [[word:chogadaja|chogadaja]] || [[word:chogadasha|chogadasha]] || [[word:chogadaka|chogadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chogadafthaf|chogadafthaf]] || [[word:chogadafjaf|chogadafjaf]] || [[word:chogadafshaf|chogadafshaf]] || [[word:chogadafkaf|chogadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chogadasha|chogadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chogadshësha|chogadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chogadrosha|chogadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chogadmusha|chogadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chogadyasha|chogadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochogadnkshësha|gochogadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochogadnkrosha|gochogadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochogadnkmusha|gochogadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochogadnkyasha|gochogadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chogagadasha|chogagadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chogagadshësha|chogagadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chogagadrosha|chogagadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chogagadmusha|chogagadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chogagadyasha|chogagadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochogagadnkshësha|gochogagadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochogagadnkrosha|gochogagadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochogagadnkmusha|gochogagadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochogagadnkyasha|gochogagadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chegædasha|chegædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chegædshësha|chegædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chegædrosha|chegædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chegædmusha|chegædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chegædyasha|chegædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochegædnkshësha|gochegædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochegædnkrosha|gochegædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochegædnkmusha|gochegædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochegædnkyasha|gochegædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chogfadasha|chogfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chogfadshësha|chogfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chogfadrosha|chogfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chogfadmusha|chogfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chogfadyasha|chogfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochogfadnkshësha|gochogfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochogfadnkrosha|gochogfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochogfadnkmusha|gochogfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochogfadnkyasha|gochogfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
